question.en: How does XML to JSON conversion work?

answer.en: XML elements become JSON object keys. Repeated sibling elements become JSON arrays. XML attributes are included as properties (with an @ prefix or merged). Text content becomes a string value.

question.en: Is XML to JSON conversion lossless?

answer.en: Not always. XML has features (namespaces, processing instructions, DTD, mixed content) that have no direct JSON equivalent. For typical data-carrying XML, conversion is clean.
JSON is easier to work with in JavaScript and most modern languages. Converting legacy XML APIs to JSON makes them easier to consume in web applications.

question.en: Can I convert JSON back to XML?

answer.en: Yes. Use the JSON to XML Converter tool.
